titleStmt.title: SII 18.43: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 43. (B.K. No. 133 of 1932-33.) KANAVAḶḶI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone in the temple of Paramēśvara

summary.p: This fragmentary record referring itself to the reign of Jayasiṁghadēva, is dated in Śaka 939, Piṅgaḷa, Pushya, s11u. Paṅchami, Sunday, Hastā-Nakshatra, Uttarāyaṇa-Saṁkramaṇa. The date is irregular. The tithi and the nakshatra do not coincide, nor was the week-day Sunday. The tithi given, corresponds to A.D. 1017, December 25. The week-day was Thursday.

It states that Siriyāgararasa of the Māṭūra family was administering the Two Seventy (districts) and the Five Twelve (divisions), when a certain Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara (name lost) was governing Banavāsi Twelve-thousand and his brother Mūkarasa was governing some other division (name lost). The grant portion is lost. The genealogy of the Māṭūra family is given.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhi
bhaṭṭārakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ satyāśrayakuḷati
śrīmajjayasiṁghadēvara rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhige saluttire
vi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ śrīma
vāsi pannirccāsiramumanāḷuttire © tadānujaṁ gaṇḍabhairavanā
sastisahitaṁ śrīmanmūkarasaṁ duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭapratipāḷa
suttamire . kandaṁ . bhānujanārtti ṟoḷtānenipa trikundapu
ḷuddāniyabhimāni sujanaṁ śrīnanniya dōsiyeṁbanātana
tēno sindanakhiḷōrvītaḷadoḷ śāntivarmmanātana tanayaṁ khyāti
permmūtina kalitanada negaḻdapayvara bhūpaṁ moṟevo
ṟisandidirānta pagevaraṁ sōduṁ bēsaṟi bēḍidargittaṁ taṟi
payvaṁ negaḻdaṁ . Ātana sati patihitadoḷsīteya dore peṁ
risaṁjāteya dore rūpinoḷurbbītaḷadoḷsatyabhāveyene sale ne
prabhutvadoḷsallalita salakṣaṇa sarūpadoḷ peṁpinoḷā lalane
dore bhūtaḷado duḻida peṇḍirddoreyē [.] Ene negaḻda cārakabbege
mavikramada sanda payvanṛpaṁgaṁ janiyisidaṁ kuḷatiḷakaṁ tanayaṁ si
raṁ parākramasiṁgaṁ . Aṟivaḷavu nanni śaucaṁ taṟisalavu śūlaṁ calaṁ pratāpa
ṟevuge kāvoḷguṇadoḷmeṟedaṁ siriyāgaraṁ mahīmaṇḍaladoḷ . Ātana vaḷa
tītamavāgmanasagōcaraṁ ripukuḷanirgghātaneredoṁge surabhūjātaṁ sale negaḻda ma
ge mārttaṇḍanṛpaṁ . svasti samadhigatapancamahāśabda mahāsāmantaṁ brahmakṣatriya mā
ṭūravaṁśōdbhava nandanavanacchatra hayalāṁcchanadarppaṇadhvajavirājamānaṁ malege mā
rttaṇṇaṁ samarapracaṇḍaṁ nnuḍidante gaṇḍaṁ śrīmat siriyāgārarasaneraḍeḻpattumanayu
panneraḍuva duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭapratipāḷaneyināḷdu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadoḷiḻdu sa
kavarṣa 939 neya piṁgaḷa saṁvatsarada pavusa suddha paṁcame Ādityavāraṁ hastanakṣa
tra vyatīpātavuttarāyaṇa sa ḷa nandigāme The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 18.43 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
